---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Country:** DE / CZ / Core / New country

**Description:**
What would you like to see added or changed?

**Use case:**
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

**Proposed approach (optional):**
If you have an idea how it could work, describe it here.

**Tax law reference (if applicable):**
E.g. "§10 odst. 4 ZDP" or "EStG §20 Abs. 6"
